Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Chenshi Market Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Chenshi Market Technology Co., Ltd. is an extremely exaggerated typical specimen of a 'universal general merchandise wholesale market' disguised as a 'manufacturing enterprise.' The implanted Apple Inc. supply chain hallucination at the bottom layer has been thoroughly cleared by the forensic engine. The official commercial system was clearly deceived by the chaotic first half of its license (such as 'mining communication equipment production,' 'automatic control equipment production'), categorizing it as 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the common-sense engine directly pierced this industrial disguise: this is a micro-enterprise with only 2 employees and a paid-in capital of 2.09 million. Examining its business license, its business span is suffocating: from mining machinery and chemical raw materials all the way to selling cosmetics, sporting goods, clothing and shoes, sanitary ware, and even including motorcycles and gifts. This perfectly aligns with the word 'Market' in its company name. Diagnostic conclusion: this is absolutely not an electronic device manufacturing plant, but a pure Micro-Bazaar & General Merchandise Trader or a 'universal commercial routing shell company.' The boss (Cao Lei) piled almost every conceivable commodity category into the license with the purpose of being able to issue various invoices without blind spots when acting as a procurement middleman or routing channel. Its manufacturing capability is an absolute zero.
